text:
Once upon a time, there was a girl named Lily who loved collecting old seashells at the beach.

One day, while scavenging under the starlit sky, she found a peculiar shell. Its exterior shimmered with an eerie luminescence. Curiously, Lily picked it up.

Suddenly, a mischievous voice hummed through the shell.

"Well, hello there. I haven't heard you come a-snuggling."

Lily chuckled nervously. "Who could know such secrets? Just this shell, it seems."

The voice continued.

"I've listened to a lot of things. Books on forgotten lore. The rustling of leaves at twilight. Even the dreams of midnight birds."

She closed the shell. That night, she dreamed of a magical sea creature who was always waiting for her to share stories.

The next morning, Lily decided to visit the nearest antique shop. Among various odd treasures, she found an ancient diary. In it were stories—
